products.name: Energy Storage Systems (ESS)
products.descriptor: High-performance Li-Ion subsea energy storage system for offshore applications up to 6 MWh

evidence.snippet:
Typical applications for our Energy Storage Systems:
• Backup energy source for offshore applications with high energy demands (>1 MWh)
• At Oil & Gas production facilities to ensure that critical control systems and sensors are continuously powered

products.name: Li-Ion PowerLogger™
products.descriptor: Autonomous subsea data logger with integrated Li-Ion battery in a single housing

evidence.snippet:
Li-Ion PowerLogger™
===================
The PowerLogger™ is a combination of subsea data loggers and the Li-Ion technology of the Powerpacks™. It is a complete and autonomous measuring system in a housing.

products.name: Frames (ROV/AUV Inspection-Sensor-Pack)
products.descriptor: Subsea sensor frame with data logger for ROV or AUV inspection missions

evidence.snippet:
ROV Inspection-Sensor-Pack
--------------------------
ROV Inspection-Sensor-Pack installed on a typical inspection-class ROV

Specification
*   Depth rating shallow water of up to 6000m
*   Free configuration of various sensors

products.name: Subsea NetDI® Logger
products.descriptor: Highly reliable versatile subsea data logger and controller

evidence.snippet:

MicroDI® (Micro Data Interface) data Logger is especially designed for rough environmental condition

products.name: NetDI® Deck-Unit
products.descriptor: Surface deck-mounted data logger for complex sensor measuring, controlling and regulation tasks

evidence.snippet:
NetDI® Deck-Unit
================
The NetDI® data logger was developed over many years to fulfill complex measuring, controlling and regulation tasks. A multitasking real-time kernel takes care of the processes of all tasks. It works on the basis of an embedded industrial ARM. The 7“ touchscreen visualizes data in a quick-look window.

products.name: OceanPack™ AQUA
products.descriptor: Water-quality monitoring system for aquaculture and maritime applications measuring pCO2, O2, pH, nitrate

evidence.snippet:
Benefits
*   High precision sensor system with maritime science and offshore industry specifications
*   Long-term solid and autonomous measurements

products.name: OceanPack™ BUOY
products.descriptor: Compact pCO2 buoy analyzer for precise shallow-water ocean measurements

evidence.snippet:
OceanPack™ BUOY
===============
The OceanPack™ _p_CO2 BUOY Analyzer was developed for precise measurements in shallow water. It is very small and easy to maintain.
